events.name: CA District Hueneme Port Event
events.result: Team 5805 was Rank 28/42 with a record of 4-7-0 in quals, competed in the playoffs as the 2nd Pick of Alliance 3, and was eliminated in the Finals with a playoff record of 3-3-0.

events.name: CA District Orange County Event
events.result: Team 5805 was Rank 23/37 with a record of 5-7-0 in quals, competed in the playoffs as the 2nd Pick of Alliance 3, and was eliminated in the Double Elimination Bracket (Round 5) with a playoff record of 3-2-0.

events.name: FIRST California Southern State Championship presented by Qualcomm
events.result: Team 5805 was Rank 45/60 with a record of 5-7-0 in quals.

lastEvent.result: Team 5805 was Rank 45/60 with a record of 5-7-0 in quals.
